product_title: Sony Wh-1000xm5 (black) Over-ear Bluetooth® Wireless Noise-canceling Headphones (black)
consensus_summary: The Sony WH-1000XM5 are widely praised as premium over-ear noise-canceling headphones with industry-leading ANC performance, excellent sound quality, and comfortable design. Users consistently highlight the exceptional noise cancellation, long battery life, and intuitive touch controls. Some users report minor issues with fit comfort during extended wear and connectivity occasional hiccups.
pros: Exceptional sound quality with balanced, detailed audio
Up to 40 hours battery life per charge
Lightweight, comfortable design for extended use
Multipoint Bluetooth connectivity for seamless switching
cons: Earcup fit may not suit all head shapes
Headband can feel pressure during long sessions
Companion app connectivity can be inconsistent
Lacks wired audio jack for connectivity
red_flags: Some units experience earcup padding degradation over time
Customer service response times can be slow
